title: arctostaphylos bracteosa
intro: Arctostaphylos bracteosa, also known as Bigberry manzanita, is a shrub species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is a type of manzanita, a flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos bracteosa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, and herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures can be made from its leaves and branches.
